pattern.imageEvidence: solar panel brush-wash evidence with roof-safety context
pattern.styleContract: Clean ledger confidence with roof-safety proof, real panel-washing evidence, sun-stamp action accents, and a receipt table as the signature move.

tagline: Solar panels cleaned gently, safely, and without output guesswork.

hero.title: SunWash solar panel cleaning hero image
hero.alt: Solar panel cleaning technician using a soft water-fed brush on residential rooftop panels under a clear sky.

contact.serviceArea: Residential solar panel washing, bird-mess rinse downs, pollen season cleanups, production-check photos, and soft-brush maintenance across sunny suburbs, lake homes, and rural rooflines

copy.eyebrow: Solar panel cleaning with receipt-level scope
copy.heroTitle: Clean panels, clear scope, no roof heroics.
copy.heroText: SunWash washes dusty, pollen-coated, and bird-marked panels with soft brushes, filtered water, safety-minded roof access, and before/after panel notes you can actually read.
copy.introTitle: What we check before water touches glass
copy.introText: Panel count, roof pitch, access path, water source, inverter location, bird-mess spots, and any cracked glass or loose conduit get noted before the wash plan is priced.
copy.quoteText: Request a quote with panel photo, roof angle, approximate panel count, water spigot location, and any production dip notes. We will reply with a clear scope and safe access plan.

services.title: Panel Face Wash
services.text: Soft-brush panel cleaning with filtered rinse water, frame-edge debris removal, and a final photo pass for visible dust, pollen, and bird mess.

services.title: Bird Mess Spot Reset
services.text: Targeted cleaning for stubborn panel spots, rail corners, and high-splash areas without abrasive scrubbing or mystery chemicals.

services.title: Output Note Package
services.text: Before/after photos, access notes, panel count confirmation, and a simple maintenance window recommendation for the next dusty season.

process.title: Confirm roof access
process.text: You send photos and panel count; we check pitch, ladder path, water access, and any areas that need extra caution.

process.title: Wash glass gently
process.text: We use soft brushes and filtered rinse water, working panel rows without stepping on glass or flooding roof penetrations.

process.title: Send the receipt
process.text: You get completion photos, scope notes, and a next-clean window based on pollen, dust, trees, and bird activity.

proof.label: panel-safe wash method with no harsh scrubbing
before and after notes included with every visit
roof pitch and ladder path checked before scheduling

notes: Works: a receipt table. gives the page a memorable shape.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Get estimate, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: solar panel brush-wash evidence with roof-safety context.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic service-receipt-stack recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Soft brush: panel-safe wash method with no harsh scrubbing.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send photos from the ground, access notes, weather or date constraints, and the warning signs you noticed so the visit starts safely.
serviceDetails.prepNote: You send photos and panel count; we check pitch, ladder path, water access, and any areas that need extra caution.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Risk-check flow for Residential solar panel washing, bird-mess rinse downs, pollen season cleanups, production-check photos, and soft-brush maintenance across sunny suburbs, lake homes, and rural rooflines: photos, weather, access, and no-go conditions shape the safe visit plan.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For solar panel cleaning service, panel count, roof pitch, water access, production dips, and safe reach are checked first, so nobody guesses from the driveway.
